common.confirmDeleteManifest: This will remove the manifest and will permanently delete all its annotations from your computer.

iiifImporter.title: Import IIIF Manifest
iiifImporter.description: Paste the URL to a <strong1>IIIF Presentation Manifest</strong1>. The following links will <strong2>not</strong2> work:
iiifImporter.linkTypeViewerPages: viewer pages – e.g. pages that embed Mirador or Universal Viewer.
iiifImporter.linkTypeImageApi: IIIF Image API endpoints – ending with <code1>info.json</code1>.
iiifImporter.alreadyImportedMessage: This manifest already exists in the current subfolder. IMMARKUS allows you to import the same manifest multiple times, but each import must be placed in a different subfolder. To proceed, please select another subfolder and import the manifest there.
iiifImporter.collectionDetected: This is a IIIF Collection Manifest with multiple items. <selectButton>Select items to import</selectButton>.

errors.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch. Server may restrict access.
errors.imageApiUnsupported: Image API URLs are currently unsupported
errors.help: IMMARKUS could not import from this URL. See our <troubleshootingLink>troubleshooting guide</troubleshootingLink> for information on common import problems and possible solutions.

importFromCollection.title: Import from IIIF Collection
importFromCollection.description: This collection contains multiple presentation manifests. Choose which items to import into your workspace.
importFromCollection.alreadyExists: {{name}} already exists in the current subfolder. IMMARKUS allows multiple imports of the same manifest, but each one must be placed in a different subfolder. To continue, please remove this manifest from the list or choose a different subfolder.

iiifExporter.description: This generates a ZIP file with everything you need to publish your work as a IIIF resource, ready to deploy to your own web server. Since IIIF requires absolute URL references, please enter the base URL where your files will be hosted. This URL will be written into the manifest and annotation list(s).
iiifExporter.hint: Extract the ZIP and serve its contents at exactly this URL.
iiifExporter.validationError: Please enter a valid URL, including the protocol (e.g. https://)
